Pickleball tournament management system for organizing live events. It uses React, Node.js, MongoDB, and Express to create a modern and responsive web application. It also uses Azure Cloud Services and AI Foundry to securely store, process, and respond to user queries.
Pickleball tournament management system for organizing live events.

AI-powered tech assistant built to help users with troubleshooting and Q&A. It uses Azure Cloud Services and AI Foundry to securely store, process, and respond to user queries. Built with Vue.js for the frontend, the experience of using Libra should be simple, intuitive and engaging.
AI-powered tech assistant for troubleshooting & Q&A.

Pegasus is an intelligent data workspace that transforms how teams interact with data by merging advanced database management with a powerful, AI-driven dashboarding system. At its core is a sophisticated natural language querying engine that allows users to ask questions in plain English and instantly receive accurate SQL results, automated visualizations, and actionable insights. This AI-native platform automates complex workflows—from generating full data tables on the fly to performing predictive analysis—while enabling users to build stunning, interactive dashboards that can be shared and edited in real-time. By seamlessly integrating these intelligent automations with a familiar spreadsheet interface and a 'Bring Your Own Model' architecture, Pegasus empowers anyone to turn raw data into a dynamic, visual storytelling experience without writing a single line of code.

I am a Computer Science student at the University of Texas at Dallas with a deep-rooted passion for architecting scalable, high-performance web applications. My interest in software engineering began with a curiosity for how complex systems operate behind the scenes, which evolved into a focus on Full Stack software development. I specialize in crafting robust and reliable back-end driven applications using a variety of OOP languages and paradigms.

Beyond standard development, I am a Cloud Enthusiast with a particular focus on Azure Cloud Services and the integration of Artificial Intelligence into user-centric products. My personal and professional experiences have allowed me to learn and apply cloud tecnhologies and AI to build innovative solutions that ultimately benefit users and solve real world problems.

Driven by a commitment to continuous learning, I am constantly exploring the bleeding edge of technology—from the AI bubble to the latest in web developement and software engineering. My goal is to always bridge the gap between human-centric design and powerful, efficient engineering.

As a Software Engineering Intern on the Early Detection & Monitoring Service (EDMS) team, I supported critical infrastructure for major banking customers.
Enhanced and maintained internal tools using .NET 3 and ASP, focusing on bug fixes, UI/UX improvements, and performance optimization.
Developed a Customer Map with MapLibre.js to visualize over 10,000 customer office locations with real-time status indicators.
Built a comprehensive Alerts Dashboard for monitoring production alerts, filterable by day, server, or cumulative totals.
Initiated the migration of a legacy tool to a modern stack (.NET 8 + Vue.js) to improve performance and user experience.
Improved data reporting pages to provide clearer metrics on customer environments and team performance.

Following an exceptional internship performance, I was selected for a specialized Software Engineering Apprenticeship on the Base Software Team. I focus on architecting modern features and enhancing the scalability of ARGO's flagship banking platforms.

Spearheaded the migration of the application’s graphing engine from Apex-Charts to Highcharts, standardizing complex data visualizations across the main dashboard for improved performance and consistency.
Engineered a Process Routing Panel from the ground up, providing customers with intuitive, real-time administrative control over server-side process management.
Collaborated closely with senior architects to implement high-priority feature requests and resolve critical production bugs within an Agile development environment.
